The '''Abridon Government Center''' was the capitol building of [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] and home of the [[Abridon Government Council]].

==Characteristics==
Three towers joined by a central disk, it sat on a hill named [[Government Mound]] in the middle of the [[Abridon capital city|capital city]]. Behind it was a sheer, craggy cliff face that led down to a river that curved around the hill. In front of it lay well-tended gardens.

==History==
Its gardens were marred, however, when General [[Brenn Tantor]] set up an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] command center at the foot of the hill after [[Massacre on Abridon|retaking]] the Government Center from [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who had [[Uprising on Abridon|captured]] it only days before.

Ironically enough, Tantor himself captured both the command center and the Government Center in a [[Liberation of Abridon|third battle]] after he defected to the Rebellion.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
